item.title: Notes on Earning Commitment
item.description:
A note on naming. The original filename in the course archive referenced “RMT370” by typo; the content was prepared for the RMT 340 Earning Commitment unit and has been filed there.

COURSE: RMT 340, Influencing Customer Decisions FROM: Joshua Keyes DATE: May 21, 2023 SUBJECT: Notes on Earning Commitment

Six Principles of Influence

  1. Reciprocity. This principle suggests that people feel obligated to repay others in kind for what they have received. When someone does something nice for us or gives us a favor, we tend to feel the need to reciprocate and return the favor.
